_comment: School Buddy — Azure deployment parameters. Sensitive values must be stored as GitHub Secrets (see CICD_HANDOVER.md). Update placeholder values before first deployment.

image._comment_tagStrategy: Options: 'sha' (git short SHA, recommended), 'semver' (e.g. v1.2.3), 'latest' (not recommended for production)

appSettings._secrets_comment: POSTGRES_PASSWORD and GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY must be stored as GitHub Secrets (POSTGRES_PASSWORD, GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY) — never put secret values here
